get.description: Retrieve a list of subscriptions

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Items per page. Limit must be between 1 and 250.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort order. If not set, default is createdAt.

parameters.name: desc
parameters.description: Sort direction. If not set, default is ASC.

parameters.name: subscriberExternalId
parameters.description: The shopify ID of the subscriber

parameters.name: subscriptionExternalId
parameters.description: The shopify ID of the subscription

parameters.name: friendlyId
parameters.description: The friendly ID of the subscription

parameters.name: includeDunningInstances
parameters.description: If true, attach list of dunning instances for the contract

get.description: Get subscription by id
Get subscription subscription billing delivery cadence update preview - used to preview PATCH - /subscriptions/:id/billingDeliveryCadence

200.description: Successfully retrieved subscription billing delivery cadence update preview - used to preview PATCH - /subscriptions/:id/billingDeliveryCadence

patch.description: Update the stuatus of the subscription

Send the subscriber an email update the payment method of the subscription. Leaving the paymentMethodExternalId null in the body payload will send an email to the subscriber to reset their payment method.

post.description: Apply a discount code to a subscription

delete.description: Remove a discount code from a subscription

patch.description: Update subscription contract and lines delivery cadences. If no matching line cadences, the line is left alone.

200.description: Successfully updated subscription contract and lines delivery cadences

patch.description: Update the delivery address for a subscription
Update the delivery shipping option for a subscription

200.description: Successfully updated subscription delivery shipping option
Successfully updated subscription with the new offer option

patch.description: Update subscription customAttributes. Note this completely overwrites the customAttributes instead of merging the existing customAttributes with new key-value pairs.

get.description: Retrieve a list of memberships

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Items per page. Limit must be between 1 and 250.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort order. If not set, default is createdAt.

parameters.name: desc
parameters.description: Sort direction. If not set, default is ASC.

parameters.name: subscriberExternalId
parameters.description: The shopify ID of the subscriber

externalId.description: The shopify id of the subscriber
The shopify selling plan group ID

deliveryInterval.description: The frequency multiplier that determines how often an add-on product is included with deliveries. Values: 1 (every delivery), 2 (every other delivery), 3 (every third delivery), etc

deliveryStartOffset.description: How many orders to skip before starting the delivery cadence

sellingPlanId.description: The shopify selling plan ID of the subscription offer option

discountCodeExternalId.description: The shopify id of the discount code

externalId.description: The shopify contract ID of the subscription

paymentMethodExternalId.description: The shopify payment method card ID

paymentMethodEmail.description: The payment method email (only shows for paypal payment type)

subscriptions.description: Array of subscriptions for the current page

externalId.description: The shopify selling plan group ID

subscriptionOffers.description: Array of subscription offers for the current page

status.description: The status to update the subscription to

cancelReason.description: The reason for cancelling the subscription. Only applies if status is CANCELLED

paymentMethodExternalId.description: The shopify payment method card ID

deliveryShippingOptionCode.description: The code of the shipping option to update to

priceInContractCurrency.description: The price shipping option is fixed to in the contract currency. ie 49.99

upsert.description: When true, merges new custom attributes with existing ones. When false, completely overwrites existing custom attributes. Default is false

ready.description: Whether the billing attempt is still processing.

paymentMethodExternalId.description: The shopify payment method card ID

paymentMethodEmail.description: The payment method email (only shows for paypal payment type)

baseOrderChargedAmount.description: The charged amount of the based order associated with the billing attempt if exists

nextBillingDate.description: The date of the next billing date

nextDeliveryDate.description: The date of the next delivery date

anchoredNextBillingDate.description: The anchor date of the next delivery date

isPause.description: Whether the dates are updated because of pause. If so, it appends additional custom attributes to the subscription.

skip.description: Should skip or unskip the order

currentPrice.description: The price of the variant before the subscription discount. Only use if you want to override the default price of the variant.

sellingPlanId.description: The shopify selling plan ID of the subscription offer option. The configured discount will be used to calculated the amount of the line.

variantExternalId.description: The shopify id of the variant

modifierType.description: Type of discount: PERCENTAGE or FIXED_AMOUNT

discount.description: Discount amount. If modifierType is PERCENTAGE, this is a percentage (0-100). If FIXED_AMOUNT, this is the amount in currency.

variantPriceOverride.description: Override price for the variant. If specified, this will be used instead of modifierType and discount.

subscriptionLines.description: Array of subscription lines for the current page

deliveryInterval.description: The frequency multiplier that determines how often an add-on product is included with deliveries. Must be >= 2. Values: 2 (every other delivery), 3 (every third delivery), etc. Note: interval=1 (every delivery) does not require a schedule.

deliveryStartOffset.description: How many orders to skip before starting the delivery cadence

currentPrice.description: The price of the variant before the subscription discount. Only use if you want to override the default price of the variant.

sellingPlanId.description: The shopify selling plan ID of the subscription offer option. The configured discount will be used to calculated the amount of the line.

schedule.description: The line item delivery schedule settings

deliveryInterval.description: The frequency multiplier that determines how often an add-on product is included with deliveries. Must be >= 2. Values: 2 (every other delivery), 3 (every third delivery), etc. Note: To convert back to "every delivery" (interval=1), use DELETE /subscriptionLines/:id/schedule instead.

deliveryStartOffset.description: How many orders to skip before starting the delivery cadence

upsert.description: When true, merges new custom attributes with existing ones. When false, completely overwrites existing custom attributes. Default is false

subscribers.description: Array of subscribers for the current page

externalId.description: The shopify order line item ID
The shopify id of the order

baseOrderId.description: The id of the base order

orders.description: Array of orders for the current page

orderLineItems.description: Array of order line items for the current page

webhooks.description: Array of webhooks for the current page

products.description: Array of products for the current page

billingAttempts.description: Array of billing attempts for the current page

subscriptionDiscountCodes.description: Array of subscription discount codes for the current page

cancelReasonComments.description: The cancellation reason provided by the end user

apiToken.description: The API token if the activity was triggered by API

targetEntityType.description: The type of the target entity

targetEntityId.description: The id of the target entity

subscriptionActivities.description: Array of subscription activities for the current page

sequenceNumber.description: The sequence number of the order from the subscription. The order can be skipped so it is not the same as the fulfilled order number.

baseOrders.description: Array of base orders for the current page

baseOrderLineItems.description: Array of base order line items for the current page

swapAndAddOnOptions.description: Array of swap and add-on options for the current page

order.description: The order of the question in the list
The order of the question in the list

memberships.description: Array of memberships for the current page

email.description: The email of the member. The customer with the email should exist in Shopify. Otherwise, the request will fail.

startedAt.description: The start date of the membership. If not provided, it defaults to the current date.
